assessment.note: He narrowed his response to what felt controllable, which signals unresolved uncertainty about what change was actually expected; also hints at disengagement, but that is off-signature. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'focused on delivery because that felt controllable' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Feedback heard
new_queue.name: What feedback did you actually take in from that process?
new_queue.description: Gets at the concrete message he internalized, rather than the formal outcome.

new_queue.label: Feedback meaning
new_queue.name: What does that feedback mean to you now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces his current interpretation and whether it is shaping his choices.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make the next few weeks feel more deliberate?
new_queue.description: Finds the smallest useful support without reopening diagnosis or blame.

new_queue.label: Concrete next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into a specific commitment.
